programme.desc: Thrill-seeker Cricket Green tricks his country family into taking a 'road trip' in space, which ends up endangering all of Big City.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - 2/33'. On Christmas Eve, Tilly helps Cricket redeem his year's worth of bad deeds for one last chance to get on Santa's nice list. Meanwhile Gramma and Nancy look for a present for Bill.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E80 - Virtually Christmas'. When Cricket gets snowed in at the Remingtons' on Christmas Eve, he attempts to recreate his family's Christmas Eve traditions in a virtual reality video game.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Space Chicken'. To impress his neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space.The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Cricket Versus, Blue Tater'. Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a food truck.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Swimming Fool, Tilly's Goat'. When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Mech-X4
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Let's Call It MECH-X4! Part 1'. When Ryan Walker's mysterious new power leads him to a giant robot, he and his friends go up against a monstrous threat.

programme.title: Mech-X4
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Let's Call It MECH-X4! Part 2'. Ryan and the team set out to prove to Bay City they're heroes, only to find themselves targeted by a terrifying new monster.

programme.title: Mech-X4
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Let's Get Some Air!'. As Ryan and the team race to cure Harris of a strange ailment, they find themselves trapped in a cave-in.

programme.title: Mech-X4
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Let's Open the Monster Heart!'. When our heroes break into a hi-tech lab to discover the secrets behind the monsters, Ryan comes face to face with the deadly creator of the beasts.

programme.title: Mech-X4
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Let's Be Idiots'. As enemies secretly close in on the team, Ryan battles his nemesis in a skating competition.

programme.title: Wandi & Kabz
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Shaka Zulu'. Wandi and Kabz are warming up for soccer practice when Shaka Zulu, the famous South African warrior appears on the field. He magically takes them back in time.

programme.title: Moon Girl And Devil Dinosaur
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Run the Rink'. When Lunella runs the rink for a night, she agrees to Casey's get-rich-quick scheme, which threatens Moon Girl's reputation and her family's beloved business.

programme.title: Moon Girl And Devil Dinosaur
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Check Yourself'. When Lunella loses a game of chess against a supercomputer, her obsession with winning drives the frustrated computer to program every device in the school to attack her.

programme.title: Miraculous Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: 'S5/E127 - Revolution'. Ladybug has lost the Miracle Box. Monarch has never been so close to victory. But our heroes will prove to be more united than ever. This new trial will mark them for life.

programme.title: Miraculous Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: 'S5/E128 - Representation'. Ladybug has lost the Miracle Box. Monarch has never been so close to victory. But our heroes will prove to be more united than ever. This new trial will mark them for life.

programme.title: Miraculous Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: 'S5/E129 - 5/129'. Ladybug has lost the Miracle Box. Monarch has never been so close to victory. But our heroes will prove to be more united than ever. This new trial will mark them for life.

programme.title: Stuck In The Middle
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Stuck in the Waterpark'. The Diaz family jumps in, slides down and wades right into the metaphorical deep end of a family vacation when Harley's winning invention scores the family a free trip to a waterpark.

programme.title: Stuck In The Middle
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Stuck in the Aqualympics'. The family engages in water sports when Harley's winning invention scores them a free trip to a waterpark.

programme.title: Stuck In The Middle
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Stuck in a Commercial'. Harley and Ethan partner up to make a TV commercial for their dad's store.

programme.title: The Villians Of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - We Don't Care'. After Amy and Hartley decide to use a villain song in a 'Battle of the Bands,' Eva forbids them. When a delivery person drops off Celia's new recliners, Vic gives them an upgrade.

programme.title: The Villians Of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - 1/18'. It's Declan and Hartley's anniversary and to surprise her, he arranges an escape room event. But when the family arrives, they begin to worry things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: The Villians Of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - 1/19'. When the family gets shocking news, they embrace their villain side and go to Centropolis on a mission. Colby must get out of a sticky situation and Hartley tries her best to help.

programme.title: The Villians Of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - How the Villain Stole Christmas'. Set in the past, Onyx issues an annual ruin Christmas challenge. The villain family breaks up into two teams to win it all but gets more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S3/E53 - Bah Humbugged'. The Baxter-Carter-Grayson clan is in the holiday spirit, but Booker and Nia are at odds over new versus old family traditions. Raven and Garrett butt heads in the kitchen.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S3/E54 - Hoop Streams'. When the school's basketball team makes it to the National Championship, Tess hosts a streamed telethon to raise funds for the team to travel.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S2/E31 - 101 Lizards'. Ravi's lizard has 12 babies. He tries to find parents for them. Ms Chesterfield offers to help, but Ravi's worried she wants to make handbags out of them. He couldn't be more wrong.

programme.title: Jessie
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - The Trouble With Tessie'. Worried Tony is getting too clingy and jealous, Jessie panics when she's invited to dinner to meet his parents and finds a ring in her dessert. Is he about to propose?

programme.title: Gravity Falls

programme.title: Gravity Falls

programme.title: Gravity Falls

programme.desc: Witness Laurie's final confrontation with Michael Myers, the masked figure who has haunted her since she escaped his killing spree four decades ago.
